mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.model_id, r.image_media_id, r.image_url, r.result_json, r.nutrition_json, r.candidates_json, r.response_time_ms, r.error_message, r.status, r.recognized_name, r.confidence, r.calories, r.suggestion, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.deleted_at, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, am.name as model_name
mapper.select: select from cook_ai_image_recognition_logs r left join cook_users u on u.id = r.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_ai_models am on am.id = r.model_id where r.id = #{id} and r.deleted_at is null

select from cook_ai_image_recognition_logs r left join cook_users u on u.id = r.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_ai_models am on am.id = r.model_id where r.id = #{id} and r.user_id = #{userId} and r.deleted_at is null
mapper.update: update cook_ai_image_recognition_logs set deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
